name: Hanil Hyundai Cement Co., Ltd
summary: Hanil Hyundai Cement Co., Ltd researches, develops, manufactures, and sells cement in South Korea. It provides various types of Portland cement, such as ordinary, thermal, crude steel, and sulphate; and blast furnace slag cement, as well as concrete. The company was formerly known as Hyundai Cement Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hanil Hyundai Cement Co., Ltd. in July 2018. Hanil Hyundai Cement Co., Ltd was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea. Hanil Hyundai Cement Co., Ltd operates as a subsidiary of Hlk Holdings Co., Ltd.
